case_title: GONZALEZ, PHILIPPE A. DBA ROVERLAND INC. VS STRUBLE, TOM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,655.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, PHILIPPE A. DBA ROVERLAND INC. AS TO DEFENDANT STRUBLE, TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO TOM STRUBLE, RETURNED TO COURT FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STRUBLE, TOM
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-11-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 8/11/06 AT 8:30 A.M. TO CURE UNITMELY SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, PHILIPPE A. DBA ROVERLAND INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRUBLE, TOM $1,655.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,735.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
